description_long: This coatrack features a tall, slender vertical pole with a smooth, dark finish, likely made of metal. It is equipped with three evenly spaced, short horizontal hooks protruding from one side near the upper section, designed for hanging coats, hats, or bags. The hooks are cylindrical and robust, seamlessly integrated into the main pole for a minimalist and functional appearance. The base of the pole is simple and unadorned, suggesting it is intended to be mounted into the ground or another surface for stability. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments, emphasizing a utilitarian, modern design. The overall construction appears sturdy and suitable for use in public or semi-public urban environments such as building entrances, lobbies, or sheltered outdoor areas.
description: A tall, dark-finished metal coatrack with three sturdy horizontal hooks and a minimalist, utilitarian design. The pole is smooth and unadorned, emphasizing function over decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical pole with three horizontal hooks clearly visible on one side.
description_view_1: Side view where the pole appears as a thin line and the hooks are seen edge-on, making them less prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the hooks visible but oriented in the opposite direction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the pole as a thin line with hooks barely visible.
